creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: jadawin
Date: Mon Mar 10 14:01:13 2014
New Revision: 347756
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/347756
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r347756/

Log:
  - Update to 13.0 beta 1
  
  PR:		ports/187350
  Submitted by:	maintainer

Modified:
  head/multimedia/xbmc/Makefile
  head/multimedia/xbmc/distinfo
  head/multimedia/xbmc/files/patch-clang
  head/multimedia/xbmc/files/patch-configure.in
  head/multimedia/xbmc/pkg-plist

Modified: head/multimedia/xbmc/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/multimedia/xbmc/Makefile	Mon Mar 10 13:50:24 2014	(r347755)
+++ head/multimedia/xbmc/Makefile	Mon Mar 10 14:01:13 2014	(r347756)
@@ -1,8 +1,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	xbmc
-DISTVERSION=	13.0.alpha11
-PORTREVISION=	4
+DISTVERSION=	13.0.beta1
 CATEGORIES=	multimedia
 
 MAINTAINER=	mickael.maillot@gmail.com
@@ -54,8 +53,8 @@ RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}sqli
 
 USE_GITHUB=	yes
 GH_ACCOUNT=	xbmc
-GH_COMMIT=	8eb49b3
-GH_TAGNAME=	Gotham_alpha11
+GH_COMMIT=	128426f
+GH_TAGNAME=	Gotham-beta1
 
 USES=		gmake iconv:wchar_t pkgconfig
 USE_AUTOTOOLS=	autoconf libtool automake libltdl
@@ -183,8 +182,6 @@ post-patch:
 		${WRKSRC}/xbmc/cores/dvdplayer/DVDCodecs/Video/VAAPI.cpp
 
 run-autotools:
-	cd ${WRKSRC}/lib/cpluff && ${SH} ./autogen.sh
-	${REINPLACE_CMD} '/lib\/cpluff/d' ${WRKSRC}/bootstrap.mk
 	cd ${WRKSRC} && ${SH} ./bootstrap
 	${REINPLACE_CMD} "s;'' iconv;iconv;" ${WRKSRC}/configure
 

Modified: head/multimedia/xbmc/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/multimedia/xbmc/distinfo	Mon Mar 10 13:50:24 2014	(r347755)
+++ head/multimedia/xbmc/distinfo	Mon Mar 10 14:01:13 2014	(r347756)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@

+SHA256 (xbmc-13.0.beta1.tar.gz) = 28c6d6289e4fc48d0b5fa8814e31264683253b0d43cb2e42b8f316d1b44a9f00

Modified: head/multimedia/xbmc/files/patch-clang
==============================================================================
--- head/multimedia/xbmc/files/patch-clang	Mon Mar 10 13:50:24 2014	(r347755)
+++ head/multimedia/xbmc/files/patch-clang	Mon Mar 10 14:01:13 2014	(r347756)
@@ -1,6 +1,8 @@
---- ./lib/cpluff/configure.ac.orig	2014-01-01 02:26:03.000000000 +0000
-+++ ./lib/cpluff/configure.ac	2014-01-10 23:59:59.000000000 +0000
-@@ -109,12 +109,12 @@
+diff --git lib/cpluff/configure.ac lib/cpluff/configure.ac
+index bb69d19a..4316766 100644
+--- lib/cpluff/configure.ac
++++ lib/cpluff/configure.ac
+@@ -109,12 +109,12 @@ if test "$enable_threads" != no; then
      AC_LINK_IFELSE(
  [AC_LANG_SOURCE([#include <pthread.h>
  
@@ -15,7 +17,7 @@
  ])], [AC_MSG_RESULT([yes])
  cp_threads=Posix], AC_MSG_RESULT([no]))
    fi
-@@ -126,10 +126,10 @@
+@@ -126,10 +126,10 @@ cp_threads=Posix], AC_MSG_RESULT([no]))
      AC_LINK_IFELSE(
  [AC_LANG_SOURCE([#include <windows.h>
  

Modified: head/multimedia/xbmc/files/patch-configure.in
==============================================================================
--- head/multimedia/xbmc/files/patch-configure.in	Mon Mar 10 13:50:24 2014	(r347755)
+++ head/multimedia/xbmc/files/patch-configure.in	Mon Mar 10 14:01:13 2014	(r347756)
@@ -29,22 +29,3 @@
  
  # Checks for boost headers using CXX instead of CC
  AC_LANG_PUSH([C++])
-@@ -1614,7 +1620,8 @@
- if test "x$use_airtunes" != "xno"; then
-   AC_CHECK_HEADERS([shairplay/raop.h],,
-    [if test "x$use_airtunes" = "xyes"; then
--      AC_MSG_ERROR($libshairplay_not_found)
-+      AC_MSG_NOTICE($libshairplay_not_found)
-+      use_airtunes="no"
-     elif test "x$use_airtunes" != "xno"; then
-       AC_MSG_NOTICE($libshairplay_not_found)
-       use_airtunes="no"
-@@ -1632,7 +1639,7 @@
- 
-   #libshairport - as a fallback for AirTunes
-   if test "x$USE_AIRTUNES" == "x0"; then
--    AC_CHECK_HEADERS([shairport/shairport.h],,
-+    AC_CHECK_HEADERS([shairport/shairport.h],[use_airtunes="yes"],
-      [if test "x$use_airtunes" = "xyes"; then
-         AC_MSG_ERROR($libshairport_not_found)
-       elif test "x$use_airtunes" != "xno"; then
